summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Domínio Bridge Multi-Tenant SaaS System after backend refactoring from monolithic server.py (4350 lines) to modular architecture. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing completed successfully - login, dashboard, navigation, and logout all working correctly.

issues: React hydration warnings in console for <tr> inside <span> and <option> inside <span> - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warnings in TenantManagement.js and GlobalUserManagement.js - consider fixing HTML structure to avoid <span> wrapping table rows and options
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing data (2 tenants, 29 companies, 142 statements, 9508 transactions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring from monolithic server.py to modular architecture verified successful. All routes work identically to before. Modular structure: routes/ (auth, superadmin, users, dashboard, companies, chart_of_accounts, classification, statements, accounting, converter), auth/helpers.py, services/ (parsers, classification), models/, utils/. Database has existing data: 2 tenants, 29 companies, 142 statements, 9508 transactions.

super_admin_endpoints.GET /api/superadmin/dashboard: PASS - Returns global statistics (2 tenants, 6 users, 29 companies, 142 statements, 9508 transactions)
super_admin_endpoints.GET /api/superadmin/tenants: PASS - Lists all tenants with counts

frontend_navigation.Login Page: PASS - Loads correctly with email/password fields
frontend_navigation.Super Admin Dashboard: PASS - Shows global metrics (2 escritórios, 6 usuários, 29 empresas, 142 extratos)

sidebar_menu.Super Admin Menu: PASS - Dashboard, Escritórios, Usuários visible and clickable

new_structure.server.py: Main app entry point with router includes (~60 lines)
new_structure.routes/superadmin.py: Super Admin routes (dashboard, tenants CRUD, users management)

refactoring_verification.verification_result: All functionality preserved - no breaking changes detected
